comment: Build config for @backthread/extractor. `module: preserve` uses bundler-style resolution (matching the host app's ingest typecheck) while still emitting ESM .js + .d.ts to dist/. Imports carry explicit .js extensions, so the output is Node-ESM runnable and bundler-friendly. Tests (*.test.ts) + the testkit shim are excluded from the published build; they run under `node --test` (see tsconfig.test.json for their typecheck).
